name: @quatico-solutions/agent-skills
description: Quatico agent skills — the quatico-skills plugin for Claude Code and Cursor
author: Quatico Solutions AG

scripts.changeset: cp .changeset/_template ".changeset/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md" && echo 'Created changeset — edit it now'
scripts.release: pnpm run version && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: release v$(jq -r .version package.json)" && git tag "v$(jq -r .version package.json)" && echo 'Release committed and tagged. Run: git push --follow-tags'
